# Cross Designs

> A one-person South Florida web studio that builds custom websites, handles local SEO, and runs paid ads (Meta and Google) for small and local businesses. One person builds the site, ranks it on Google, and runs the ads, so clients deal with a single point of contact instead of three separate freelancers. Available to clients nationwide.

## Services
- Website builds: clean, fast, mobile-friendly custom sites that make a small business look established.
- SEO: local search optimization to rank businesses on Google for the terms their customers search.
- Paid ads: built and managed Meta and Google ad campaigns that drive calls and leads.

Services are available individually or bundled. Pricing is custom and quoted per project before any work begins.

## Links
- [Home](https://crossdesigned.com/): Services, recent work, about, and FAQ.

## Contact
- Email: cross@crossdesigned.com
- Location: South Florida, working with clients nationwide.
